metadata.description: Codex marketplace for agent-runtime-kit — 10 plugins (browser, code-review, conversation, dispatch, evidence, issue, media, meta, pr, reporting). Registered via `codex plugin marketplace add` and installed per plugin with `codex plugin add <plugin>@codex-kit`; Codex caches each plugin under $CODEX_HOME/plugins/cache/codex-kit/<plugin>/<version>/ and discovers its bundled skills/<skill>/SKILL.md. Activation is gated (see scripts/sync-runtime-surfaces.sh); the flat $CODEX_HOME/skills root stays the default discovery path until cut-over.

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Browser automation + browser-facing QA — agent-browser, playwright, browser-qa, web-qa, browser-session, web-evidence.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Read-only multi-lens code review — code-review-specialists with api-contract / data-migration / maintainability / performance / red-team / security / testing lenses.

plugins.name: dispatch
plugins.description: Plan-driven multi-PR delivery on GitHub — create/deliver/closeout plan-tracking issues, dispatch-plan, dispatch-lane execution and review.

plugins.name: evidence
plugins.description: nils-cli workflow-evidence wrappers — canary-check, docs-impact, model-cross-check, review-evidence, skill-usage, test-first-evidence, web-evidence.

plugins.name: media
plugins.description: Screen and image capture — screen-record, image-processing wrappers backed by nils-cli media tools.

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Workflow primitives — agent-docs, agent-out, agent-scope-lock, bootstrap, deploy, heuristic-inbox, pre-pr, release, repo-retro, semantic-commit, setup-project.

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: PR / MR lifecycle (GitHub + GitLab) — create/close/deliver × feat/fix and dispatch lane PRs. Hooked via block-direct-pr-create.

plugins.name: reporting
plugins.description: Read-only synthesis skills — daily-brief, topic-radar, project-retro.
